attacking_style: Shows early bridging ability to dangerous moves but lacks the explosive power to counter elite puncheur accelerations on maximum gradient finishes.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Capable on punchy classics-style terrain for sustained efforts, but maximum gradient surges expose power limitations against top-tier puncheurs.
vulnerability: Cannot match explosive accelerations from elite classics specialists like Van der Poel on steepest gradients despite strong positioning and initial bridging capacity.
key_patterns: Demonstrates tactical awareness with early bridging to key moves
Lacks explosive power differential compared to WorldTour classics elite on max gradient
Strong initial response capacity but fades when accelerations intensify on steepest sections
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to determine trend, though showed competitive positioning ability
